text:
The three-tier permission model (Viewer/Editor/Admin) is defined and enforced across these key areas:

**1. Role-to-permission mapping:**
- `pkg/apimachinery/identity/role_type.go` — Defines `RoleType` enum constants (`RoleViewer`, `RoleEditor`, `RoleAdmin`) with precedence ordering.
- `pkg/services/org/model.go` — Re-exports the role types for the org package.
- `pkg/services/accesscontrol/roles.go` — `BuildBasicRoleDefinitions()` maps each org role to a `RoleDTO` with specific permissions; `DeclareFixedRoles()` registers fixed roles and grants them to Viewer/Editor/Admin.
- `pkg/api/accesscontrol.go` — `declareFixedRoles()` on HTTPServer registers API-level fixed role grants to the three tiers.
- `pkg/services/accesscontrol/accesscontrol.go` — Defines `ReqHasRole()`, `PermissionsService` interface, and core AC service interface.

**2. Permission guard middleware:**
- `pkg/services/accesscontrol/middleware.go` — `Middleware()` wraps an `Evaluator` into a web.Handler that checks permissions; `AuthorizeInOrgMiddleware()` does the same but allows cross-org checks.
- `pkg/services/accesscontrol/evaluator.go` — Defines `Evaluator` interface and `EvalPermission`/`EvalAll`/`EvalAny` combinators used in route authorization.
- `pkg/middleware/middleware.go` — Defines `RoleAuth()` (role-based guard), `ReqOrgAdmin`, `ReqEditorRole`, `ReqSignedIn`, `ReqGrafanaAdmin`.
- `pkg/middleware/auth.go` — `Auth()` handler for authentication checks; `RoleAuth()` for org-role guards; `notAuthorized()` for rejection.
- `pkg/services/apiserver/auth/authorizer/role.go` — K8s-style role authorizer mapping Viewer/Editor/Admin verbs.

**3. Folder/dashboard permission inheritance:**
- `pkg/services/dashboards/accesscontrol.go` — `GetInheritedScopes()` walks the folder tree to resolve inherited scopes for dashboards.
- `pkg/services/accesscontrol/ossaccesscontrol/dashboard.go` — `ProvideDashboardPermissions()` wires `InheritedScopesSolver` and `GetParentFolder` for dashboard permissions with folder inheritance.
- `pkg/services/accesscontrol/ossaccesscontrol/folder.go` — `ProvideFolderPermissions()` wires `InheritedScopesSolver` for nested folder inheritance.
- `pkg/services/accesscontrol/resourcepermissions/options.go` — Defines `InheritedScopesSolver`, `ParentFolderResolver` types used in resource permission configuration.
- `pkg/services/accesscontrol/resourcepermissions/service.go` — Implements permission resolution with folder/dashboard action set expansion and inheritance.
- `pkg/services/sqlstore/permissions/dashboard.go` — SQL-level `accessControlDashboardPermissionFilter` implementing CTE-based inherited permission queries.
- `pkg/services/authz/rbac/service.go` — `checkInheritedPermissions()` walks cached folder tree for RBAC authorization.
- `pkg/services/authz/zanzana/server/server_batch_check.go` — `runFolderPermissionPhase()` implements Zanzana-based folder permission inheritance for batch authorization.
- `pkg/services/authz/zanzana/common/tuple.go` — `NewFolderParentTuple()` creates OpenFGA parent relationship tuples for folder hierarchy.
- `pkg/services/folder/folderimpl/folder.go` — Folder service implementation with permission-aware folder tree traversal (getRootFolders, getAvailableNonRootFolders).
